title: chrysaspis campestris
intro: Chrysaspis campestris, also known as wild chamomile, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its calming and soothing properties, which make it effective in treating anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, providing relief from digestive issues, skin irritations, and wounds. Chrysaspis campestris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams to utilize its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
